author: hzc
description: Edit and manage draw.io diagrams (.drawio / .dio) directly inside Obsidian. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
name: ObDrawIO

releases.author: hanzhichao
releases.description:
✨ Full Obsidian Plugin Guidelines compliance

## Version
- Manifest version: **0.1.3**
- Min App Version: **0.16.0**

## Compliance & Quality
- ✅ All Obsidian Plugin Guidelines requirements met
- ✅ ESLint: 0 errors (obsidianmd rules)
- ✅ TypeScript: Strict mode passing
- ✅ Security: No unsafe DOM operations
- ✅ Accessibility: Proper keyboard/screen reader support

## Features
- 📝 Edit .drawio files with complete draw.io editor
- 💾 Auto-save changes to vault
- 🎨 Theme synchronization (light/dark mode)
- 🔗 Create and insert diagram links
- ⚙️ Customizable settings
- 📱 Mobile compatible

## Installation
1. Download: main.js, manifest.json, styles.css
2. Create: `<Vault>/.obsidian/plugins/obdrawio/`
3. Reload Obsidian and enable plugin

## System Requirements
- Obsidian v0.16.0+
- Internet (embed.diagrams.net) or self-hosted draw.io

See README.md for complete documentation.
releases.name: ObDrawIO v0.1.3

releases.author: hanzhichao
releases.description:
🐛 Bug fixes and plugin guidelines compliance

## Compliance Fixes
- **Text Standards**: Removed redundant 'Obsidian' mentions in settings (implied by context)
- **UI Guidelines**: Removed unnecessary HTML heading from modal dialog
- **ESLint**: Fixed all obsidianmd plugin rule violations
- **Compatibility**: Improved popout window compatibility with activeDocument fallback
- **Lint Compliance**: All placeholder text now follows sentence case requirements

## Previously Fixed (v0.1.2)
- Obsidian plugin guidelines compliance issues
- Promise handling with void operator
- TypeScript union types
- API version requirements (minAppVersion: 0.16.0)

## Features
- Edit .drawio files with the complete draw.io editor
- Auto-save changes to your vault
- Theme synchronization (light/dark)
- Create and insert diagram links into notes
- Customizable settings (server URL, language, default folder)
- Support for .drawio and .dio file extensions

## Installation
1. Download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css
2. Create: <YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/obdrawio/
3. Place files in that folder
4. Reload the app and enable the plugin

## Requirements
- App version 0.16.0 or later
- Internet or self-hosted draw.io instance

See README.md for complete documentation.
releases.name: ObDrawIO v0.1.2

releases.author: hanzhichao
releases.description:
🎉 Release v0.1.1

## Changes
- Updated plugin description (removed redundant context references)
- Version bump for stability

## Features
- Edit .drawio files directly with the complete draw.io editor
- Auto-save changes to your vault
- Theme synchronization (light/dark)
- Create and insert diagram links into notes
- Customizable settings (server URL, language, default folder)
- Support for .drawio and .dio file extensions

## Installation
1. Download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css
2. Create folder: <YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/obdrawio/
3. Place the files in that folder
4. Reload the app and enable the plugin

## Requirements
- App version 0.15.0 or later
- Internet connection (for default embed.diagrams.net) or self-hosted draw.io instance

See README.md for full documentation.
